# ToolHandler delegate

Handles a `tools/call`: receives the call context and returns the tool result (spec §16.5).

```csharp
public delegate Task<CallToolResult> ToolHandler(ToolContext context);
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| context | The invocation context (arguments, metadata, notification sinks, cancellation). |

## Return Value

The tool result.
